name: NAVER Maps
description: The most accurate and up-to-date map of Korea. Used by locals daily.
features: Real-time transit info|Great transit and walking directions|Simple bus & subway routes|Restaurant & shop reviews|Indoor maps
tips:
Switch to English in settings. More accurate than Google Maps in Korea.
English search may not work, so copy and paste the Korean name.

name: KakaoMap - Map
description: Korea local map app for directions, restaurants, local places, road view and transit routes.
features: fast routes|road view|local search|bus info|subway info
tips: Useful for checking road view and local restaurants before visiting.

name: Google Maps
description: Global map app useful as a backup for saved places, reviews and general orientation.
tips: Use as a backup; Korean transit/walking details are often better in NAVER Map or KakaoMap.

name: TMAP
description: Korean navigation app focused on driving routes, traffic, safety and car navigation.
tips: Best for rental-car travel rather than general tourist walking routes.

name: Kakao T
description: Mobility platform for taxi, driver, bike, parking, train, flight and other transportation services.
tips: Taxi availability is strong, but foreign payment/account setup can vary.

name: KorailTalk
description: Official train ticket app for booking and managing Korean rail tickets including KTX.
tips: Use for intercity train reservations; compare with SRT for Suseo routes.

name: SRT - 수서고속철도
description: Official app for SRT high-speed rail reservations and ticket management.
tips: Use when departing from Suseo or using SRT lines.

name: BucaCheck - Korea Transit Card
description: Transit-card balance checking app for Korea transportation cards.
tips: Use NFC to check remaining balance before entering transit.

name: Google Translate
description: Global translation app with text, voice, camera and offline translation features.
tips: Download Korean offline pack before travel.

name: Catchtable
description: Restaurant reservation and waitlist app for finding, booking and ranking restaurants.
tips: Use for popular restaurants that require reservations.

name: VISITKOREA
description: Official Korea tourism app with attractions, food, accommodations, shopping and travel information.
tips: Use as the official tourism information hub.

name: Booking.com
description: Global accommodation booking app for hotels, apartments and travel stays.
tips: Good for English-friendly booking and cancellation rules.

name: Agoda
description: Asia-focused accommodation booking app for hotels and deals.
tips: Compare prices with Booking.com and Trip.com.

name: Trip.com
description: Global travel booking app for hotels, flights, trains and activities.
tips: Useful for comparing accommodation and flights.

name: Airbnb
description: Global app for home stays, rooms and experience bookings.
tips: Check legal/host rules and location carefully.

name: NAVER
description: Korean portal app for search, local information, shopping, news and services.
tips: Use for searching Korean names and local pages.

name: Shinsegae Duty Free
description: Duty-free shopping app for browsing and purchasing duty-free products.
tips: Useful before departure for duty-free shopping.

name: AccuWeather
description: Weather forecast app with current weather, hourly and daily forecasts.
tips: Check rain and heat forecasts before outdoor routes.

name: Lotte Duty Free
description: Duty-free shopping app for browsing and purchasing travel retail products.
tips: Compare duty-free prices before airport pickup.

name: Subway Korea App
description: Check subway routes, schedules, fares, and station information.
tips: Check station exits and transfer routes before riding.

name: HERE WeGo
description: Global navigation app with offline maps and route planning.
tips: Use as a backup if Korean map apps are unavailable. Not recommended for public tranport.

name: k.ride - taxi, cab, korea trip
description: Taxi app designed for global travelers in Korea with easier taxi hailing and payment.
tips: Recommended taxi app for foreign visitors. Live-translate chat feature can help you communicate with the driver fluently.

name: TABA - Get a taxi in Korea
description: Taxi app for Korea visitors with English support and overseas card payment options.
tips: Only use if you are using a taxi inside Seoul. Use if k.ride does not work well.

name: Seoul Bike 따릉이
description: Official Seoul public bicycle rental app.
tips: Best for parks and riverside routes; check bike availability first.

name: MobileTmoney
description: Use your phone for transit and cashless payments.
features: Transit Payment | Mobile Payment | Balance Check | Card Management
tips:
Only iOS available for foreign tourists
Visa cards unavailable

name: Naver Papago
description: Korea-friendly AI translation app for text, voice, image, handwriting and website translation.
tips: Use camera/image translation for menus and signs.

name: DeepL Translate
description: Translation app known for natural sentence translation.
tips: Useful for longer or more natural messages.

name: Baemin - Food Delivery
description: Major Korean food delivery app with restaurant ordering, pickup and delivery services.
tips: Foreign cards and various foreign languages are supported.

name: DiningCode
description: Restaurant discovery app using data and reviews to recommend places.
tips: Compare with search results in Naver Map with the keyword "맛집" or "존맛"

name: Creatrip: Korea Travel App
description: Korea travel app for activities, tours, coupons, transport, exchange rates and local travel information.
tips: Useful for foreign travelers planning schedules involving K-Beauty reservations. Various languages are supported.

name: Odii-Korea Audio Travel Guide
description: Free audio guide app with stories and cultural information for Korean tourist sites.
tips: Use at palaces, museums and historic areas.

name: NAMANE: Pay & Transit Card
description: Customizable prepaid and transit card app for Korea travelers.
tips: Use if Wise does not work for you. Actual card available in kiosk at airports or large subway stations. Visa card may not work.

name: Airalo
description: eSIM app for buying and installing mobile data plans.
tips: Install and activate before arrival if your phone supports eSIM. Compare prices and features with Nomad eSIM.

name: WAUG
description: Travel activity and ticket booking app for attractions, tours and experiences.
tips: You can find local deals and it Is easy to use. However, there are fewer choices than WAUG or Trazy.

name: Trazy
description: Korea-focused travel booking app for tours, tickets and experiences.
tips: Lots of local activities available. English is supported but other languages are not.

name: Klook
description: Global travel activities app for tickets, tours, transport and experiences.
tips: Good for English-friendly attraction tickets. One of the most recommended apps for Korean travel.

name: KKday
description: Travel activity booking app for tours, tickets and experiences.
tips: Compare with Klook and WAUG for local deals. Recommended for travelers from Southeast Asia.

name: Wise
description: International money transfer and multi-currency account app.
tips: Useful for managing travel money and transfers. Most recommend app for money transfer in Korea.

name: Nomad eSIM
description: eSIM marketplace app for travel data plans.
tips: Compare  prices and features with Airalo for Korea data pricing. Only data is avilable. If you need voice and SMS features, check Airalo
